chunks.text: --- name: autosar-mud-skill-appendix description: > Reference appendix for the AUTOSAR MUD Skill. Load this file only when the CORE skill directs you here for deep AUTOSAR concept definitions, naming keywords, data type rules, ISO 26262 guidance, anti-patterns, or worked examples. Do NOT load this for routine design tasks ‚Äî the CORE file is sufficient. ---

- [¬ßA1 ‚Äî AUTOSAR Concepts Reference](#a1) - [¬ßA2 ‚Äî Naming Keyword Cheat Sheet](#a2) - [¬ßA3 ‚Äî Data Type Deep Dive](#a3) - [¬ßA4 ‚Äî ISO 26262 / ASIL Safety Checklist](#a4) - [¬ßA5 ‚Äî Anti-Patterns Reference](#a5) - [¬ßA6 ‚Äî Worked Example 1: BatteryMonitor](#a6) - [¬ßA7 ‚Äî Worked Example 2: MtrIdqLimiter (Multi-Rate, ASIL-B)](#a7) - [¬ßA8 ‚Äî RTE API Quick Reference](#a8)

| Type | Description | When to Use | |------|-------------|------------| | `AtomicSwComponentType` | Contains runnables, internal behavior, and state | Most application SWCs | | `SensorActuatorSwComponentType` | Directly accesses hardware | Sensor read / actuator write SWCs | | `CompositionSwComponentType` | Structural container; no runnables inside | System-level decomposition only | | `ServiceSwComponentType` | BSW services (NvM, Dem, Com, etc.) | Do not design internals here | | `ParameterSwComponentType` | Provides CalPrm to application SWCs | Calibration data holders |

| Port Kind | Tag | Interface Type | RTE API Family | Typical Use | |-----------|-----|----------------|---------------|------------| | Provider Port | P-Port | SenderReceiverInterface | `Rte_Write` / `Rte_IWrite` | Provides data to other SWCs | | Require Port | R-Port | SenderReceiverInterface | `Rte_Read` / `Rte_IRead` | Reads data from other SWCs | | Bidirectional | PR-Port | SenderReceiverInterface | Both read and write | Feedback loops | | Provider Port | P-Port | ClientServerInterface | `OperationInvokedEvent` | Exposes an operation | | Require Port | R-Port | ClientServerInterface | `Rte_Call` | Calls server operation | | Require Port | R-Port | ParameterInterface | `Rte_CData` | Reads calibration parameter | | Require/Provide | R/P-Port | NvDataInterface | `Rte_Read` / `Rte_Write`
| NvM persistent data | | Require Port | R-Port | ModeSwitchInterface | `Rte_Mode` | Queries active system mode |

**Explicit Communication** ‚Äî data transferred at the exact moment of RTE call. - API: `Rte_Read_<RPort>_<DataElem>(&var)` / `Rte_Write_<PPort>_<DataElem>(&var)` - Data is fresh at the exact call point. - Use for: event-triggered runnables, server runnables, conditional reads. - Concurrency note: manual consistency management needed.

**Implicit Communication** ‚Äî RTE copies all port data at runnable entry/exit. - API: `Rte_IRead_<Runnable>_<RPort>_<DataElem>()` / `Rte_IWrite_<Runnable>_<PPort>_<DataElem>(&var)` - RTE guarantees a consistent snapshot for the entire runnable execution. - Use for: cyclic runnables with a fixed, known I/O set.
> **Decision rule:** Default to Explicit unless the requirement says "consistent snapshot" or the runnable is purely cyclic with no conditional port access.

chunks.section: A1.4 Runnable Entities and RTE Events
chunks.text: | RTE Event | Trigger | Add Runnable When... | |-----------|---------|---------------------| | `InitEvent` | ECU startup | Component has static state, NvM reads, or CalPrm | | `TimingEvent` | Fixed period | Periodic monitoring, control, filtering | | `DataReceivedEvent` | New data on R-Port | Event-driven processing on arrival | | `DataReceiveErrorEvent` | Timeout / data loss | Fault detection, degradation mode | | `OperationInvokedEvent` | Client calls C-S P-Port | Server operation implementation | | `ModeSwitchEvent` | Mode transition | Mode entry / exit reactions | | `BackgroundEvent` | Idle | Low-priority background tasks |

**ExclusiveArea:** - Protects shared data between runnables of the SAME SWC that may preempt each other. - Declare in `InternalBehavior`; generated as `Rte_Enter_<AreaName>()` / `Rte_Exit_<AreaName>()`. - Keep as short as possible ‚Äî only the read-modify-write section. - Needed when: two runnables in different OS tasks share a static variable or IRV.

**InterRunnableVariable (IRV):** - Typed variable that passes data between runnables within the same SWC. - Access: `Rte_IrvRead_<Runnable>_<IrvName>()` / `Rte_IrvWrite_<Runnable>_<IrvName>(&val)` - If runnables are in different OS tasks ‚Üí ALWAYS wrap IRV access in ExclusiveArea. - IRV is NOT an S/R port ‚Äî it is internal to the SWC.

1. camelCase, letters+digits only, no underscores between keywords. 2. Start with uppercase letter. 3. Semantic order: `[Environment-Mean-Device][Action-PhysicalType][Condition-Qualifier][Index][ForPreposition][FieldBlock2]` 4. Sequence number suffix for evolvable elements: `BattU1`, `EngN2`.

| Full Term | Abbreviation | Full Term | Abbreviation | |-----------|-------------|-----------|-------------| | Acceleration | `Accr` | Limitation | `Linn` | | Active | `Actv` | Maximum | `Max` | | Actuator | `Actr` | Minimum | `Min` | | Average | `Avg` | Mode | `Mod` | | Battery | `Batt` | Motor | `Mtr` | | Calibration | `Cal` | Number / Speed | `N` | | Calculated | `Calc` | Output | `Out` | | Clamped | `Cld` | Parameter | `Prm` | | Command | `Cmd` | Pedal | `Pedl` | | Control | `Ctrl` | Position | `Pos` | | Converter | `Convtr` | Power | `Pwr` | | Counter | `Ctr` | Pressure | `P` | | Current (ampere) | `I` | Raw | `Raw` | | d-axis | `Id` (motor context) | Reference | `Ref` | | Diagnostic | `Diag` | Request | `Req` | | Driver | `Drvr` | Sample | `Smp` | | Duty Cycle | `DutyCyc` | Sensor |

`Sns` | | Enable | `En` | Speed | `N` | | Engine | `Eng` | State / Status | `St` | | Error | `Err` | Temperature | `T` | | Feedback | `Fbk` | Threshold | `Thd` | | Filter | `Filt` | Time | `Ti` | | Flag | `Flg` | Torque | `Tq` | | Frequency | `Freq` | Value (generic scalar) | `Val` | | Identification | `Id` (general) | Voltage | `U` | | Index | `Idx` | Warning | `Warn` | | Input | `In` | Weight | `W` | | Integrator | `Intgtr` | Wheel | `Whl` | | q-axis | `Iq` (motor context) | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

| Concept | shortName | longName | |---------|-----------|---------| | Engine speed | `EngN` | `Engine speed` | | Battery voltage | `BattU` | `Battery voltage` | | Filtered battery voltage | `BattFiltV` | `Battery filtered voltage` | | Battery voltage warning status | `BattWarnSt` | `Battery voltage warning status` | | Motor q-axis current reference | `MtrIqRef` | `Motor q-axis current reference` | | Motor overcurrent status | `MtrOcSt` | `Motor overcurrent status` | | Driver torque request | `DrvrTqReq` | `Driver torque request` | | Torque limitation request for pedal implausibility | `TqLinnReqForPedlImp1` | `Torque limitation request for pedal implausibility` |

| AUTOSAR Element | Rule | |----------------|------| | `SwComponentType` | Noun compound, no domain prefix, no underscore, camelCase | | `PortPrototype` | Reflects role relative to THIS component | | `SenderReceiverInterface` | Independent of usage context; ends with sequence number | | `VariableDataPrototype` | `Val` if generic scalar; otherwise descriptive (`St`, `Req`, `Fbk`) | | `ApplicationDataType` | Reflects physical meaning; ends with sequence number | | `CompuMethod` | `{Unit}Identcl` (IDENTICAL), `{Unit}Lnrl` (LINEAR), `{TypeName}` (TEXTTABLE) | | `Unit` | SI units: `V`, `A`, `Nm`, `rpm`; derived: `Sqd`, `Per`, `ToPwrOfN` | | `PhysicalDimension` | Torque: `Len2M1TiNeg2`; Energy: `Len2M1TiNeg2_1` | | `ExclusiveArea` | `EA_<ProtectedResource>` | | `InterRunnableVariable` | Descript
ive noun, camelCase | | Runnable | `<SwcName>_<NNNms>` or `<SwcName>_Init` or `<SwcName>_On<PortEvent>` |
``` ApplicationDataType  ‚Üê‚îÄ‚îÄ physical meaning, unit, CompuMethod, DataConstr ‚îÇ ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ mapped via typeEmitter to: ImplementationDataType  ‚Üê‚îÄ‚îÄ C type, bit size, sign, endianness ```

| Physical Quantity | ApplicationDataType | CompuMethod | ImplementationDataType | Range | |------------------|--------------------|-----------  |----------------------|-------| | Voltage (0‚Äì65.535 V) | `U1` | LINEAR: 0.001 V/LSB | `uint16` | 0‚Äì65535 | | Battery voltage (0‚Äì25.5 V) | `BattU1` | LINEAR: 0.1 V/LSB | `uint8` | 0‚Äì255 | | Engine speed (0‚Äì8000 rpm) | `EngN1` | LINEAR: 0.125 rpm/LSB | `uint16` | 0‚Äì65535 | | Torque (‚àí1000‚Äì+1000 Nm) | `TqNm1` | LINEAR: 0.1 Nm/LSB, offset ‚àí1000 | `sint16` | ‚àí32768‚Äì+32767 | | Temperature (‚àí40‚Äì+215 ¬∞C) | `T1` | LINEAR: 1 ¬∞C/LSB, offset ‚àí40 | `uint8` | 0‚Äì255 | | Boolean status | `Sts1` | TEXTTABLE: 0=FALSE, 1=TRUE | `boolean` | ‚Äî | | Enumerated mode | `OpMod1` | TEXTTABLE: 0=Init, 1=Normal‚Ä¶ | `uint8` | 0‚ÄìN | | Motor current (‚àí400‚Äì+400 A) | `MtrI1` | LIN
EAR: 0.01 A/LSB | `sint16` | ‚Äî |

**LINEAR:** ``` physicalValue = (numerator / denominator) √ó rawValue + offset ``` Named `{Unit}Lnrl` e.g., `VLnrl`, `NmLnrl` **IDENTICAL:** ``` physicalValue = rawValue (same unit, no conversion) ``` Named `{Unit}Identcl` e.g., `VIdentcl`
**TEXTTABLE:** Maps integer values to symbolic names. Named after the data type: `WarnSt1`, `OpMod1`.
- `lowerLimit`: minimum valid physical value - `upperLimit`: maximum valid physical value - Values outside constraints ‚Üí RTE reports `RTE_E_INVALID` or tool generates range check code. ---
Apply when the SWC is ASIL-A or higher.

| # | Check | Action | |---|-------|--------| | 1 | **All Rte_Read returns checked** | Store in `Std_ReturnType`; handle `!= RTE_E_OK` with safe default | | 2 | **Safe defaults defined for every input** | Use compile-time `#define`, not magic numbers inline | | 3 | **Range validation on all inputs** | Check against `DataConstr` min/max before use | | 4 | **No unprotected shared static state** | Use ExclusiveArea for every cross-task static variable | | 5 | **No division by zero** | Guard all divisions: `if (denom != 0.0f)` | | 6 | **No unbounded loops** | All loop bounds must be compile-time constants | | 7 | **No recursion** | AUTOSAR runnables must not call themselves | | 8 | **No dynamic memory** | No `malloc`, `free`, `new`, `delete` ‚Äî static allocation only | | 9 | **Pointer null chec

ks** | Use `NULL_PTR` from Platform_Types; check before dereference | | 10 | **CalPrm pointer immediate dereference** | `val = *Rte_CData_...()` ‚Äî never store pointer across calls | | 11 | **MISRA-C:2012 target** | No implicit type conversions; explicit casts with `(type)` | | 12 | **DEM reporting for HW faults** | `Rte_Call_R_Dem_SetEventStatus(event, DEM_EVENT_STATUS_FAILED)` | | 13 | **Init runnable present** | Every stateful ASIL SWC must have an `InitEvent` runnable | | 14 | **No dead code** | Every `if` / `else` branch must be exercisable | | 15 | **NaN / Inf guard for float** | Initialize all `float32` to 0.0f; check result validity | | 16 | **ASIL decomposition ‚â• C** | Split into two independent SWCs (ASIL-B + ASIL-B) |

| Anti-Pattern | Problem | Correct Approach | |-------------|---------|-----------------| | Ignoring `Rte_Read` return | Silently uses stale/invalid/never-received data | Always check `rteStatus != RTE_E_OK` | | `Rte_Write` return value silently discarded with no comment | Unclear intent | Either `(void)Rte_Write(...)` with comment, or check and log | | Storing CalPrm pointer | Pointer may be invalidated after online calibration | Dereference immediately; store value, not pointer | | Cross-task IRV without ExclusiveArea | Race condition, data corruption | Always protect IRV with `Rte_Enter/Exit_<EA>` if runnables in different tasks | | Unique interface per SWC | Interface proliferation, violates TR_SWMG_00011 | One interface per data concept; reuse across SWCs | | `t_MyType` or `swc_Batt`

naming | Violates TR_SWNR_00056 and TR_SWNR_00007 | `BattU1`, no kind-indicator prefix | | Underscores in shortName between keywords | Violates TR_SWNR_00009 | camelCase: `EngNReq` not `Eng_N_Req` | | float division without guard | NaN propagation if divisor is zero | `if (denominator != 0.0f) { result = num / denominator; }` | | Recursive runnables | Forbidden in AUTOSAR and MISRA-C | Restructure as state machine with static state variable | | `malloc` / dynamic allocation | Forbidden in automotive embedded AUTOSAR | Fixed-size static arrays; buffers sized at compile time | | Multiple `Rte_Read` calls for same element in one runnable | Possible data inconsistency between reads | Read once to local variable; use local variable throughout | | Init runnable missing when static state present
| State may be garbage on startup | Always add `InitEvent` runnable that initializes all static vars |

Create a software component `BatteryMonitor` that reads battery voltage from a sensor port, applies a moving average filter over 8 samples, and provides the filtered voltage as a float. It also provides a boolean warning flag if filtered voltage drops below 11.0 V. Runnable triggered every 100 ms.

- K1: ‚úÖ Monitor battery voltage - K2: ‚úÖ Reads battery voltage from sensor - K3: ‚úÖ Provides filtered voltage + warning flag - K4: ‚úÖ Every 100 ms - K5: Partial ‚Äî voltage unit mentioned (V), threshold given. Raw type not stated ‚Üí **[ASSUMPTION: raw input is uint16 ADC counts, LINEAR 0.01 V/LSB]**
**PAT_FILTER** ‚Äî "filter", "moving average" keywords present.

**Component:** `BattMon` (`AtomicSwComponentType`) Long name: *Battery monitor* #### Port Table | Port ShortName | Direction | Interface | Data Elem | Impl. Type | Notes | |---------------|-----------|-----------|----------|-----------|-------| | `BattU` | R-Port | `BattU1` (S/R) | `Val` | `uint16` | LINEAR: 0.01 V/LSB | | `BattFiltV` | P-Port | `BattFiltV1` (S/R) | `Val` | `float32` | Physical V | | `BattWarn` | P-Port | `BattWarn1` (S/R) | `St` | `boolean` | TRUE = undervoltage |

#### Runnable Table | Runnable | RTE Event | Cycle | Reads | Writes | |----------|-----------|-------|-------|--------| | `BattMon_100ms` | TimingEvent | 100 ms | `BattU` | `BattFiltV`, `BattWarn` | #### Assumptions Made - [ASSUMPTION: Raw input is uint16 ADC, LINEAR 0.01 V/LSB. Correct if sensor uses different resolution.] - [ASSUMPTION: FILTER_SIZE = 8. Increase for smoother response at cost of lag.] - [ASSUMPTION: Safety level QM. Add range checks and DEM reporting if ASIL required.]

```c /** * @brief   Runnable: BattMon_100ms * @trigger TimingEvent, period = 100 ms * @swc     BattMon (AtomicSwComponentType) * @ports   R: BattU (BattU1, S/R, Explicit) *          P: BattFiltV (BattFiltV1, S/R, Explicit) *          P: BattWarn  (BattWarn1, S/R, Explicit) * @safety  QM */

#define BATTMON_FILTER_SIZE     (8U) #define BATTMON_CONV_FACTOR     (0.01f)   /* V/LSB ‚Äî CompuMethod BattULnrl */ #define BATTMON_WARN_THRESHOLD  (11.0f)   /* V */ #define BATTMON_RAW_SAFE        (0U)      /* Safe default: 0 V on read failure */

void BattMon_100ms(void) { /* ‚îÄ‚îÄ 1. Local Variables ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ Std_ReturnType  rteStatus; uint16          rawAdc; float32         physVoltage; static float32  filterBuf[BATTMON_FILTER_SIZE] = {0.0f}; static uint8    bufIdx = 0U; float32         avgVoltage = 0.0f; boolean         warnActive; uint8           i;

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ 2. Read Raw Battery Voltage ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ rteStatus = Rte_Read_BattU_Val(&rawAdc); if (rteStatus != RTE_E_OK) { rawAdc = BATTMON_RAW_SAFE; /* [ASSUMPTION: safe default = 0 on read failure] */ }

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ 3. Physical Conversion (CompuMethod LINEAR: 0.01 V/LSB) */ physVoltage = (float32)rawAdc * BATTMON_CONV_FACTOR; /* ‚îÄ‚îÄ 4. Moving Average Filter ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ filterBuf[bufIdx] = physVoltage; bufIdx = (uint8)((bufIdx + 1U) % BATTMON_FILTER_SIZE);

for (i = 0U; i < BATTMON_FILTER_SIZE; i++) { avgVoltage += filterBuf[i]; } avgVoltage /= (float32)BATTMON_FILTER_SIZE; /* ‚îÄ‚îÄ 5. Undervoltage Warning Logic ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ warnActive = (avgVoltage < BATTMON_WARN_THRESHOLD) ? TRUE : FALSE;

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ 6. Write Outputs ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ (void)Rte_Write_BattFiltV_Val(&avgVoltage); (void)Rte_Write_BattWarn_St(&warnActive); } ```

```mermaid graph TD Start(["TimingEvent 100ms ‚Äî BattMon_100ms"]) --> ReadRaw ReadRaw[/"Rte_Read: BattU_Val ‚Üí rawAdc"\] ReadRaw --> ChkRte{"rteStatus == RTE_E_OK?"} ChkRte -->|"No"| SafeVal["rawAdc = BATTMON_RAW_SAFE"] ChkRte -->|"Yes"| Convert

SafeVal --> Convert Convert["physVoltage = rawAdc x 0.01 LINEAR conversion"] --> UpdateBuf UpdateBuf["filterBuf at bufIdx = physVoltage\nbufIdx increments mod 8"] --> CalcAvg CalcAvg["avgVoltage = sum of filterBuf divided by 8"] --> WarnCheck

WarnCheck{"avgVoltage less than 11.0 V?"} -->|"Yes"| WarnTrue["warnActive = TRUE"] WarnCheck -->|"No"| WarnFalse["warnActive = FALSE"] WarnTrue --> WriteV WarnFalse --> WriteV WriteV[/"Rte_Write: BattFiltV_Val ‚Üê avgVoltage"\] WriteV --> WriteW[/"Rte_Write: BattWarn_St ‚Üê warnActive"\] WriteW --> End(["End of Runnable"]) ```

| # | Check | Result | Note | |---|-------|--------|------| | 1 | All SLOT markers replaced | ‚úÖ | None remaining | | 2 | SwcName: camelCase noun, no prefix | ‚úÖ | `BattMon` | | 3 | Interface names end with sequence number | ‚úÖ | `BattU1`, `BattFiltV1`, `BattWarn1` | | 4 | Every Rte_Read return checked | ‚úÖ | `rteStatus` checked on line 2 | | 5 | Safe default on error path | ‚úÖ | `BATTMON_RAW_SAFE = 0U` | | 6 | All `#define` constants present | ‚úÖ | 4 defines at top | | 7 | Static variables declared static | ‚úÖ | `filterBuf`, `bufIdx` | | 8 | Mermaid: no spaces in node IDs | ‚úÖ | All IDs clean | | 9 | Mermaid: all diamonds have 2 labelled edges | ‚úÖ | `ChkRte` and `WarnCheck` | | 10 | All assumptions listed | ‚úÖ | 3 assumptions documented |
**Overall: PASS ‚Äî all ‚úÖ** ---

Create a software component `MtrIdqLimiter` for a PMSM FOC controller on AURIX TC37x. It samples d-axis and q-axis motor currents at 1 ms, then every 10 ms applies calibratable current limits (`IdMax`, `IqMax`), computes available q-axis headroom, clamps the q-axis reference output, and provides an overcurrent status flag. Safety level: ASIL-B.
All 5 Key Facts present. No defaults needed.
**PAT_MULTI_RATE** ‚Äî "1 ms sample + 10 ms process" = two explicit cycle times.

**Component:** `MtrIdqLimiter` (`AtomicSwComponentType`) Long name: *Motor d-q axis current limiter* #### Port Table | Port | Direction | Interface | Data Elem | Impl. Type | Notes | |------|-----------|-----------|----------|-----------|-------| | `MtrIdRaw` | R-Port | `MtrIdRaw1` (S/R) | `Val` | `sint16` | ADC counts | | `MtrIqRaw` | R-Port | `MtrIqRaw1` (S/R) | `Val` | `sint16` | ADC counts | | `MtrIdqLimPrm` | R-Port | `MtrIdqLimPrm1` (Param) | `IdMax`, `IqMax`, `IAdcScale` | `float32` | CalPrm | | `MtrIqRefCld` | P-Port | `MtrIqRef1` (S/R) | `Val` | `float32` | A ‚Äî clamped Iq ref | | `MtrOcSt` | P-Port | `MtrOcSt1` (S/R) | `St` | `boolean` | TRUE = overcurrent |

#### Runnable Table | Runnable | Event | Cycle | Reads | Writes | |----------|-------|-------|-------|--------| | `MtrIdqLimiter_Init` | InitEvent | once | `MtrIdqLimPrm` | IRV: `IdqRawSmp` | | `MtrIdqLimiter_1ms` | TimingEvent | 1 ms | `MtrIdRaw`, `MtrIqRaw` | IRV: `IdqRawSmp` | | `MtrIdqLimiter_10ms` | TimingEvent | 10 ms | IRV: `IdqRawSmp`, CalPrm | `MtrIqRefCld`, `MtrOcSt` |

#### IRV and ExclusiveArea | Name | Type | Between | Protection | |------|------|---------|-----------| | `IdqRawSmp` | `MtrIdqRaw1` (struct: `Id: sint16`, `Iq: sint16`) | `MtrIdqLimiter_1ms` ‚Üî `MtrIdqLimiter_10ms` | `EA_IdqSmp` |

```c /** * @file    MtrIdqLimiter.c * @brief   Motor d-q axis current limiter SWC * @safety  ASIL-B */ /* ‚îÄ‚îÄ Module-Level Types ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ typedef struct { sint16 Id; sint16 Iq; } MtrIdqRaw1;

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ Safety Fallback Defaults ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ #define MTRIDQLIM_ID_MAX_DEF   (50.0f)    /* A ‚Äî if CalPrm unavailable */ #define MTRIDQLIM_IQ_MAX_DEF   (80.0f)    /* A */ #define MTRIDQLIM_ADC_SCALE_DEF (0.01f)   /* A/count */ #define MTRIDQLIM_RAW_SAFE     ((sint16)0)

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ Static Module State ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ static MtrIdqRaw1 s_IdqRawSmp = {0, 0};  /* IRV mirror ‚Äî protected by EA_IdqSmp */ /* ‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê * INIT RUNNABLE * ‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê */ /** * @brief   Runnable: MtrIdqLimiter_Init * @trigger InitEvent */ void MtrIdqLimiter_Init(void) { MtrIdqRaw1 zeroSmp = {0, 0}; float32    zeroRef = 0.0f; boolean    ocFalse = FALSE;

Rte_IrvWrite_MtrIdqLimiter_Init_IdqRawSmp(&zeroSmp); (void)Rte_Write_MtrIqRefCld_Val(&zeroRef); (void)Rte_Write_MtrOcSt_St(&ocFalse); } /* ‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê * FAST RUNNABLE: 1ms ‚Äî raw ADC acquisition * ‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê */ /** * @brief   Runnable: MtrIdqLimiter_1ms * @trigger TimingEvent, period = 1 ms * @safety  ASIL-B ‚Äî read failure uses safe default (0 A) */ void MtrIdqLimiter_1ms(void) { Std_ReturnType rteStatus; MtrIdqRaw1     sample;

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ Read d-axis raw current ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ rteStatus = Rte_Read_MtrIdRaw_Val(&sample.Id); if (rteStatus != RTE_E_OK) { sample.Id = MTRIDQLIM_RAW_SAFE; /* ASIL-B: safe default on sensor failure */ }

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ Read q-axis raw current ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ rteStatus = Rte_Read_MtrIqRaw_Val(&sample.Iq); if (rteStatus != RTE_E_OK) { sample.Iq = MTRIDQLIM_RAW_SAFE; } /* ‚îÄ‚îÄ Write IRV (protected against 10ms preemption) ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ*/ Rte_Enter_EA_IdqSmp(); Rte_IrvWrite_MtrIdqLimiter_1ms_IdqRawSmp(&sample); Rte_Exit_EA_IdqSmp(); }

/* ‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê * SLOW RUNNABLE: 10ms ‚Äî limit computation * ‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê‚ïê */ /** * @brief   Runnable: MtrIdqLimiter_10ms * @trigger TimingEvent, period = 10 ms * @safety  ASIL-B ‚Äî null pointer guard on CalPrm; range clamp on outputs */ void MtrIdqLimiter_10ms(void) { MtrIdqRaw1  sample; float32     idPhys; float32     iqPhys; float32     iqHeadroom; float32     iqRefClamped; boolean     ocActive;

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ 1. Read CalPrm (ParameterInterface) ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ const float32 *pIdMax    = Rte_CData_MtrIdqLimPrm_IdMax(); const float32 *pIqMax    = Rte_CData_MtrIdqLimPrm_IqMax(); const float32 *pAdcScale = Rte_CData_MtrIdqLimPrm_IAdcScale();

/* ASIL-B: null-pointer guard + immediate dereference */ float32 idMax    = (pIdMax    != NULL_PTR) ? *pIdMax    : MTRIDQLIM_ID_MAX_DEF; float32 iqMax    = (pIqMax    != NULL_PTR) ? *pIqMax    : MTRIDQLIM_IQ_MAX_DEF; float32 adcScale = (pAdcScale != NULL_PTR) ? *pAdcScale : MTRIDQLIM_ADC_SCALE_DEF;

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ 2. Read IRV snapshot (protected) ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ Rte_Enter_EA_IdqSmp(); sample = Rte_IrvRead_MtrIdqLimiter_10ms_IdqRawSmp(); Rte_Exit_EA_IdqSmp(); /* ‚îÄ‚îÄ 3. Convert ADC counts to physical amperes ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ idPhys = (float32)sample.Id * adcScale; iqPhys = (float32)sample.Iq * adcScale;

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ 4. Overcurrent detection ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ ocActive = ((idPhys > idMax) || (iqPhys > iqMax)) ? TRUE : FALSE; /* ‚îÄ‚îÄ 5. Clamp d-axis for headroom calculation ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ if (idPhys > idMax) { idPhys = idMax; }

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ 6. Compute q-axis available headroom (simplified linear) */ /* Full implementation: iqHeadroom = sqrt(IqMax^2 - idPhys^2) */ iqHeadroom = iqMax - idPhys; if (iqHeadroom < 0.0f) { iqHeadroom = 0.0f; } /* ASIL-B: clamp negative result */

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ 7. Clamp q-axis current reference ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ iqRefClamped = (iqPhys > iqHeadroom) ? iqHeadroom : iqPhys; /* ‚îÄ‚îÄ 8. Write outputs ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ (void)Rte_Write_MtrIqRefCld_Val(&iqRefClamped); (void)Rte_Write_MtrOcSt_St(&ocActive); } ```

```c /* ‚îÄ‚îÄ Explicit Sender-Receiver ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ Std_ReturnType Rte_Read_<RPort>_<DataElem>(<Type> *data); Std_ReturnType Rte_Write_<PPort>_<DataElem>(const <Type> *data); /* ‚îÄ‚îÄ Implicit Sender-Receiver ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ <Type>  Rte_IRead_<Runnable>_<RPort>_<DataElem>(void); void    Rte_IWrite_<Runnable>_<PPort>_<DataElem>(const <Type> *data); <Type> *Rte_IWriteRef_<Runnable>_<PPort>_<DataElem>(void);

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ Client-Server (synchronous) ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ Std_ReturnType Rte_Call_<RPort>_<Operation>(<in_args>, <out_args>); /* ‚îÄ‚îÄ Calibration Parameter ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ const <Type> *Rte_CData_<RPort>_<CalPrmName>(void); /* Usage: const float32 *p = Rte_CData_R_Gain_Kp(); float32 kp = *p; */

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ InterRunnableVariable ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ <Type> Rte_IrvRead_<Runnable>_<IrvName>(void); void   Rte_IrvWrite_<Runnable>_<IrvName>(const <Type> *data); /* ‚îÄ‚îÄ ExclusiveArea ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ void Rte_Enter_<AreaName>(void); void Rte_Exit_<AreaName>(void);

/* ‚îÄ‚îÄ Mode Switch ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ <ModeEnumType> Rte_Mode_<RPort>_<ModeGroup>(void); /* ‚îÄ‚îÄ DEM Event Reporting ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ */ Std_ReturnType Rte_Call_<DemRPort>_SetEventStatus( Dem_EventIdType          EventId, Dem_EventStatusType      EventStatus   /* DEM_EVENT_STATUS_FAILED / PASSED */ ); ```
